reviews.comment:

(Translated by Google)
Very good service and attention, excellent place to stop halfway to Rosario.

reviews.comment:
Muy limpio, juegos para niños, lugar a la sombra donde sentarse a descansar o tomar algo antes de seguir viaje.

(Translated by Google)
Very clean, children's play area, shady place to sit and rest or have something to eat before continuing your journey.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/16093166206795082767/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURCa3F5NHpnRRAB

reviews.comment:
Muy lindo lugar para parar un rato en la Ruta excelente atención.

(Translated by Google)
Very nice place to stop for a while on the Route, excellent service.

reviews.comment:
Excelente atención de parte del personal, da gusto ser cliente de dicha estación!

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service from the staff, it's a pleasure to be a customer of this station!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/16093166206795082767/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURCcEtUaC13RRAB

reviews.comment:
La atencion de la Cajera media seca y mal humorada
Los playeros la mejor son buenos pibes

(Translated by Google)
The cashier was rather curt and grumpy. The beach staff were the best; they were nice guys.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/16093166206795082767/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURCOEpxQmJnEAE

reviews.comment:
Siempre es una buena experiencia. Muy buena atención, todos los servicios bien. Hay aire para los neumáticos en forma gratuita, estacionamiento, lugar con mesas y bancos afuera para descansar y tomar unos mates o comer algo. Muy recomendable.

(Translated by Google)
It's always a great experience. Excellent service, all the amenities are great. They offer free tire inflation, parking, and an outdoor area with tables and benches to relax and have some mate or a bite to eat. Highly recommended.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/16093166206795082767/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURCMEtybnl3RRAB

reviews.comment:
Muy bien cuidada esta YPF, los baños perfectos, hasta tienen sensor para soltar el papel para secarte las manos. Bastante linda la parte exterior para desayunar. Si vas un poco mas para adentro podes encontrar una parte para estacionar con techo, si no también al costado de los arboles. Ademas, cuenta con juegos infantiles.

(Translated by Google)
This YPF is very well maintained, the restrooms are spotless, and even have a sensor to release the paper towel for drying your hands. The outside area is quite nice for breakfast. If you go a little further in, you can find a covered parking area, or even next to the trees. It also has a children's playground.

reviewReply.comment: Muchas gracias por su comentario! Los esperamos nuevamente!

reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/16093166206795082767/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURCd09hajl3RRAB

reviews.comment:
La atención es mala los que atienden no prestan atención y te preparan lo que se les ocurre y no es la primera vez ...vuelvo solo por las ensaimadas

(Translated by Google)
The service is terrible; the staff doesn't pay attention and just prepares whatever comes to mind, and it's not the first time... I only come back for the ensaimadas.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/16093166206795082767/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNCMzZlMjlnRRAB
